docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-03-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BUTLER, RUTH AS TO DEFENDANT MIEGER, LYNN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-04-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-04-07 BY COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. PARTIES PRESENT, EVIDECNE RETAINED. CLERK-BETH WILBER, NOTHING ON RECORD. (506)
DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE AS TO PERSONAL SERVICE FILED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2007 - JUDGMENT. CLERK-BETH WILBER
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAIVED. SERVED OCT-29-2007, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MIEGER, LYNN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUTLER, RUTH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MIEGER, LYNN THE EVIDENCE PRODUCED DID NOT ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT'S TREATMENT FELL BELOW STANDARDS PREVAILING IN THE SUBJECT MEDICAL COMMUNITY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
